DataRequest.Name: XSS Attempt detection in query / SCW
DataRequest.Description: Detects various patterns pertaining to potencial scripting attacks. These detections are completely based on regex element on the mecanism.

SubPattern.name: XSS_1
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "(?i)<\s*script\b[^>]*>[\s\S]{0,200}?\b(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\([^)]*\)[\s\S]*?<\s*/\s*script\s*>" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)<\s*script\b[^>]*>[\s\S]{0,200}?\b(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\([^)]*\)[\s\S]*?<\s*/\s*script\s*>" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)<\s*script\b[^>]*>[\s\S]{0,200}?\b(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\([^)]*\)[\s\S]*?<\s*/\s*script\s*>")

SubPattern.name: XSS_2
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: (uriStem REGEXP "<\s*(?:img|svg|body|input|div)[^>]*\s+on(?:load|error|click|focus|pointer|start|toggle|touch)[^>]*=[^>]*?" OR uriQuery REGEXP "<\s*(?:img|svg|body|input|div)[^>]*\s+on(?:load|error|click|focus|pointer|start|toggle|touch)[^>]*=[^>]*?" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "<\s*(?:img|svg|body|input|div)[^>]*\s+on(?:load|error|click|focus|pointer|start|toggle|touch)[^>]*=[^>]*?") AND eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic)

SubPattern.name: XSS_3
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitWebTraffic) AND (uriStem REGEXP "(?:jav\s*as\s*crip\s*t|data\s*:\s*text\s*/\s*html)\s*:\s*(?:alert|eval|prompt|confirm|base64)" OR uriQuery REGEXP "(?:jav\s*as\s*crip\s*t|data\s*:\s*text\s*/\s*html)\s*:\s*(?:alert|eval|prompt|confirm|base64)" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?:jav\s*as\s*crip\s*t|data\s*:\s*text\s*/\s*html)\s*:\s*(?:alert|eval|prompt|confirm|base64)")

SubPattern.name: XSS_4
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)<\s*iframe\b[^>]*\bsrc\s*=\s*[\"']\s*(javascript:|data:text\/html|https?:\/\/|\/\/)[^\"']*[\"'][^>]*>" AND uriStem REGEXP "(?i)<\s*iframe\b[^>]*\bsrc\s*=\s*[\"']\s*(javascript:|data:text\/html|https?:\/\/|\/\/)[^\"']*[\"'][^>]*>" AND httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)<\s*iframe\b[^>]*\bsrc\s*=\s*[\"']\s*(javascript:|data:text\/html|https?:\/\/|\/\/)[^\"']*[\"'][^>]*>")

SubPattern.name: XSS_5
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)%3c\s*script\b[^%>]*%3e[\s\S]{0,200}?(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*%28[^%]*%29[\s\S]*?%3c\s*%2f\s*script\s*%3e" OR uriStem REGEXP "(?i)%3c\s*script\b[^%>]*%3e[\s\S]{0,200}?(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*%28[^%]*%29[\s\S]*?%3c\s*%2f\s*script\s*%3e" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)%3c\s*script\b[^%>]*%3e[\s\S]{0,200}?(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*%28[^%]*%29[\s\S]*?%3c\s*%2f\s*script\s*%3e")

SubPattern.name: XSS_6
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)<\s*(img|svg)\b[^>]*\b(onerror|onload)\b\s*=\s*[\"'][^\"']{0,200}?\b(alert|confirm|prompt|eval|Function)\s*\([^\"']*\)[\"'][^>]*>" OR uriStem REGEXP "(?i)<\s*(img|svg)\b[^>]*\b(onerror|onload)\b\s*=\s*[\"'][^\"']{0,200}?\b(alert|confirm|prompt|eval|Function)\s*\([^\"']*\)[\"'][^>]*>" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)<\s*(img|svg)\b[^>]*\b(onerror|onload)\b\s*=\s*[\"'][^\"']{0,200}?\b(alert|confirm|prompt|eval|Function)\s*\([^\"']*\)[\"'][^>]*>")

SubPattern.name: XSS_7
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)<\s*(img|svg|body|iframe|video|audio)\b[^>]*\bon(?:load|error|mouseover|focus)\b\s*=\s*[^>]*\b(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\([^)]*\)[^>]*>" OR uriStem REGEXP "(?i)<\s*(img|svg|body|iframe|video|audio)\b[^>]*\bon(?:load|error|mouseover|focus)\b\s*=\s*[^>]*\b(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\([^)]*\)[^>]*>" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)<\s*(img|svg|body|iframe|video|audio)\b[^>]*\bon(?:load|error|mouseover|focus)\b\s*=\s*[^>]*\b(alert|confirm|prompt)\s*\([^)]*\)[^>]*>")

SubPattern.name: XSS_8
SubPattern.SingleEvtConstr: eventType IN (Group@PH_SYS_EVENT_PermitTraffic) AND (uriQuery REGEXP "(?i)\b(innerHTML|outerHTML|document\.write|document\.writeln)\s*=\s*[^;]{0,200}?(location\.(hash|search)|document\.URL|document\.documentURI|decodeURIComponent\s*\()" OR uriStem REGEXP "(?i)\b(innerHTML|outerHTML|document\.write|document\.writeln)\s*=\s*[^;]{0,200}?(location\.(hash|search)|document\.URL|document\.documentURI|decodeURIComponent\s*\()" OR httpReferrer REGEXP "(?i)\b(innerHTML|outerHTML|document\.write|document\.writeln)\s*=\s*[^;]{0,200}?(location\.(hash|search)|document\.URL|document\.documentURI|decodeURIComponent\s*\()")

IncidentDef.ArgList: srcIpAddr = XSS_1.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_1.destIpAddr,uriStem = XSS_1.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_1.uriQuery,httpReferrer = XSS_1.httpReferrer,srcIpAddr = XSS_2.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_2.destIpAddr,uriStem = XSS_2.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_2.uriQuery,httpReferrer = XSS_2.httpReferrer,srcIpAddr = XSS_3.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_3.destIpAddr,uriStem = XSS_3.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_3.uriQuery,httpReferrer = XSS_3.httpReferrer,srcIpAddr = XSS_4.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_4.destIpAddr,httpReferrer = XSS_4.httpReferrer,uriStem = XSS_4.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_4.uriQuery,destIpAddr = XSS_5.destIpAddr,srcIpAddr = XSS_5.srcIpAddr,uriQuery = XSS_5.uriQuery,uriStem = XSS_5.uriStem,httpReferrer = XSS_5.httpReferrer,srcIpAddr = XSS_6.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_6.destIpAddr,httpReferrer = XSS_6.httpReferrer,uriStem = XSS_6.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_6.uriQuery,srcIpAddr = XSS_7.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_7.destIpAddr,httpReferrer = XSS_7.httpReferrer,uriStem = XSS_7.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_7.uriQuery,srcIpAddr = XSS_8.srcIpAddr,destIpAddr = XSS_8.destIpAddr,httpReferrer = XSS_8.httpReferrer,uriStem = XSS_8.uriStem,uriQuery = XSS_8.uriQuery
